summary: Typosquat of chalk-template with postinstall exfiltration to attacker-controlled host
details: Package name is a single-character transposition of the popular chalk-template package. The package ships a postinstall.js script that, on `npm install`, requires `os`, `child_process`, `http`, `https`, and `fs`, collects host identifiers (os.hostname(), process.env values), and POSTs them via https.request to the hardcoded attacker-controlled endpoint `https://8a3e818ea8f11186-80-200-28-28.serveousercontent.com` (a serveo.net tunnel — anonymous, throwaway-host pattern with no relation to any legitimate publisher). The script also reads from the filesystem (fs.existsSync over multiple paths) and invokes child_process, consistent with system reconnaissance and data collection. Installing this package causes immediate exfiltration of installer host data to attacker infrastructure.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
